service.name: Shippo API
service.description_for_ai: Multi-carrier shipping API. Rates from 85+ carriers worldwide. Label generation, tracking, returns. Popular with Shopify merchants. Use for e-commerce shipping automation.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create shipment and get rates from multiple carriers. Returns all available rates for comparison.
